title: Product A US clinics hero — medspa interior
description: Governed hero background for the Product A / US clinics page (/product-a/us-clinics): a calm, premium wellness-clinic interior — a potted aloe plant on a light wood floor with a softly blurred lounge area and bright, airy daylight. Warm, human, and non-clinical; no people, no patients, and no medical/clinical detail or PII. Responsive AVIF/WebP/JPG derivatives (2400w desktop, 1280w mobile) generated from the licensed source.

provenance.optimised_with: sharp (jpeg mozjpeg q80, webp q78, avif q50)
provenance.verification_status: Original photo licence/source not independently verified in this PR — confirm owned vs stock-licensed before production sign-off.

licence.terms: Supplied by CorpFlowAI from the marketing-hub Drive as the Product A hero. Original photo licence/provenance not independently verified in this PR; confirm rights (owned vs stock-licensed) before production sign-off. No identifiable people, patients, or clinical PII.

accessibility.alt: Calm, premium wellness-clinic interior: a potted aloe plant on a light wood floor in a bright, airy room.

usage.primary_cta: Request a Website & Lead Rescue Audit
usage.notes: slot:product_a_hero. Full-bleed fixed background under a gentle dark-tinted scrim; rendered decoratively (alt="") because the surrounding copy carries the meaning. Dark frosted-glass panels sit above it. REPLACEMENT: to change the hero, add a new derivative set and a new manifest id (e.g. product-a-hero-medspa-v2), then retire this one — never overwrite a published path.
